description_long: This is a stone bust sculpture depicting the head and upper neck of a mature male figure with defined facial features, including a prominent brow, deep-set eyes, a straight nose, and a pronounced mustache. The hair is closely cropped and textured, with subtle detailing that suggests a realistic style. The bust is mounted on a rectangular stone base, giving it stability and a sense of permanence. The surface of the sculpture is rough and weathered, with visible grain and speckling typical of granite or similar stone. The coloration is predominantly gray with lighter and darker mottling, indicating natural stone material. The overall impression is one of solemnity and gravitas, suitable for commemorative or public display.
description: A realistic stone bust of a mature man with defined facial features and a textured, weathered surface, mounted on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the stern facial expression, prominent brow, and mustache, with symmetrical features and the full face visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the nose, lips, and ear, as well as the curvature of the head and neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded back of the head, subtle hair texture, and the rectangular base, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, ear, and jawline, mirroring the left side but with slightly different lighting and surface texture.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture could be placed in an outdoor urban plaza, park, or public building.
